Case Study • Various

How we helped Anupam Rasayan Strengthens ESG Leadership with EcoVadis Silver Rating

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Introduction

As sustainability expectations continue to evolve across global supply chains, organizations are increasingly aligning business operations with internationally recognized ESG frameworks to strengthen transparency, stakeholder confidence, and long-term competitiveness.

In this evolving landscape, Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. further reinforced its sustainability positioning by successfully achieving the EcoVadis Silver Rating while advancing its greenhouse gas (GHG) management capabilities in collaboration with Growlity.

The engagement focused on building a structured, execution-oriented ESG framework aligned with global sustainability expectations while supporting data-driven environmental performance management. Through strategic ESG alignment, streamlined execution, and technology-enabled sustainability workflows, the collaboration enabled Anupam Rasayan to strengthen its ESG disclosures and sustainability credibility within the global specialty chemicals ecosystem.

About Anupam Rasayan India Ltd.

Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. is one of India’s leading specialty chemical manufacturers, serving global clients across life sciences-related sectors and advanced chemical applications. The company is recognized for its strong focus on innovation, manufacturing excellence, operational reliability, and long-term value creation.

As ESG considerations increasingly influence global procurement decisions and investor expectations, the company continued strengthening its sustainability initiatives through globally recognized assessment frameworks and enhanced environmental performance measurement practices.

Growlity’s ESG and Sustainability Enablement Approach

Strategic EcoVadis Alignment

Growlity collaborated closely with Anupam Rasayan to align sustainability disclosures and ESG documentation with EcoVadis assessment parameters. The engagement emphasized structured sustainability communication, evidence-based reporting, and alignment with globally recognized ESG evaluation standards.

The approach included:

  • ESG documentation structuring and refinement
  • Sustainability disclosure alignment
  • Assessment readiness support
  • Evidence mapping and reporting coordination
  • Strategic submission guidance aligned with EcoVadis methodology

This ensured a streamlined and well-structured assessment process while strengthening overall ESG representation.

GHG Emissions Management and Environmental Data Structuring

Alongside EcoVadis support, Growlity also enabled a structured greenhouse gas emissions management process to support environmental performance visibility and reporting readiness.

The engagement included:

  • Activity data consolidation support
  • Structured emissions calculation workflows
  • Standardized reporting alignment
  • Environmental data organization and validation support
  • Improved sustainability data visibility for internal and external stakeholders

By integrating ESG execution with emissions management workflows, the engagement created a more connected and scalable sustainability management approach.

Technology-Driven ESG Execution

Growlity leveraged its ESG technology ecosystem to improve collaboration, visibility, and execution efficiency throughout the engagement.

Key enablers included:

  • Centralized sustainability documentation management
  • Real-time coordination and workflow visibility
  • Structured ESG data tracking
  • Faster stakeholder collaboration
  • Streamlined reporting workflows

This technology-enabled execution model improved process efficiency while maintaining consistency across sustainability submissions and environmental reporting activities.

The Outcome

Through a strategically aligned and execution-focused engagement with Growlity, Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. successfully achieved the EcoVadis Silver Rating, further strengthening its sustainability positioning within the global specialty chemicals sector.

Key Outcomes

🥈 Achieved EcoVadis Silver Rating

🌍 Strengthened ESG positioning aligned with global sustainability expectations

📄 Enhanced sustainability documentation and disclosure structure

📊 Established more structured GHG emissions management workflows

⚡ Improved ESG execution efficiency through technology-enabled coordination

🤝 Reinforced sustainability credibility with global stakeholders and value chain partners

The engagement highlighted how structured ESG execution, sustainability-focused collaboration, and data-driven environmental management can support stronger ESG outcomes and long-term strategic positioning.

Why This Success Story Matters

The sustainability journey of Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. reflects a larger shift taking place across global manufacturing and specialty chemical industries:

  • ESG performance is becoming increasingly important in global supplier ecosystems
  • Sustainability ratings are strengthening stakeholder confidence and market positioning
  • Structured ESG execution is improving reporting consistency and operational alignment
  • GHG emissions management is becoming a core component of corporate sustainability strategies
  • Technology-enabled sustainability workflows are improving scalability and execution efficiency

This engagement demonstrates how organizations can strengthen sustainability positioning through strategic ESG alignment, structured execution, and globally recognized assessment frameworks.

Growlity‘s Edge

Growlity continues to support organizations through:

  • EcoVadis assessment and sustainability rating support
  • ESG strategy and execution enablement
  • GHG emissions calculation and reporting support
  • ESG documentation and disclosure management
  • Technology-driven sustainability workflows
  • Strategic sustainability advisory services

By combining ESG expertise, execution discipline, and technology-led sustainability management, Growlity helps organizations strengthen ESG performance and accelerate sustainability outcomes with greater efficiency and clarity.

Conclusion

The EcoVadis Silver achievement of Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. represents a strong step forward in reinforcing sustainability leadership within the specialty chemicals sector. Through a structured and strategically aligned engagement with Growlity, the company further strengthened its ESG positioning, sustainability reporting alignment, and environmental data management capabilities.

The engagement serves as a strong example of how organizations can elevate sustainability credibility, improve ESG readiness, and build long-term strategic value through disciplined execution and globally aligned sustainability practices.
